original_image_tags: A red "X" drawn over a white label in the upper right corner.
A red stamp mark that reads "BUREAU COPIED APR 17 1978 BY".

elements.description: A tan FBI file folder cover page featuring multiple red ink stamps, typed labels, and handwritten annotations. Visible text includes large red printed words 'FBI BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION' and 'Transfer-Call 3421'. A black stamp reads 'DO NOT DESTROY' with a handwritten 'FOIPA # 993087'. There are multiple red rectangular 'COPIED FOR FOIPA' stamps with dates and initials, including one dated 'MAY 13 1971' and another 'FEB 28 1978'. A blue label in the bottom left corner states 'Declassification authority derived from FBI Automatic Declassification Guide, issued May 24, 2007'. A white barcode label in the top left lists 'HQ - HEADQUARTERS' and numbers '0062 83894'. A white barcode label in the top right lists '62-HQ-83894', 'SERIALS 385-447', and 'SECTION 9'.

judge.reason: The descriptions are inconsistent: Description A mentions a 'red X' and a stamp dated 'APR 17 1978' but Description B does not mention either, while Description B details numerous specific stamps, labels, and annotations that Description A omits entirely.
